title: cymbopogon nervatus
intro: Cymbopogon nervatus, also known as Nervous Grass, is a species of grass native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been found to have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cymbopogon nervatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from headaches and fever. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
